course_description.overview: The 120km GranFondo route takes riders through the scenic Fraser Valley agricultural lowlands with rolling hills and steady climbs.

key_segments.name: Fraser Valley Loop
key_segments.description: Scenic route featuring rolling hills, steady climbs, and agricultural landscapes through Langley and surrounding areas.

course_description.difficulty_narrative: Challenging yet rewarding with rolling terrain and climbs suitable for kicking off the GranFondo season; fully supported with 5 aid stations.

logistics.getting_there: Start/finish at Eagle Acres Dairy Farm, 8796 240 Street, Langley Township, BC.
logistics.accommodation: Special rates at Sandman Hotel Langley and Sandman Signature Langley Hotel (block code: 2606GFONDO) for June 5-8; book early due to high occupancy.
logistics.registration_details: Online registration from Oct 14, fees $239-$320 for 120km (increasing tiers), closes June 1 or when sold out; on-site if space allows; non-refundable.
logistics.bike_logistics: All bike types welcome on shorter routes; on-course mechanical support provided.
logistics.local_considerations: Event may be canceled due to weather, safety concerns; no refunds. Package pickup June 3 & 6.

final_verdict.one_liner: Fraser Valley's largest community-focused GranFondo with epic post-ride party and charity impact.
final_verdict.who_is_it_for: All levels from families to GranFondo starters seeking scenic roads, support, and festival vibes.
final_verdict.is_it_worth_it: Yes, for the scenery, support, and unique farm festival experience at solid value.
pro_tips: Book accommodation early with event block codes.
Opt for 120km to experience full Fraser Valley beauty and 5 aid stations.
Arrive for package pickup days ahead.
Prepare for rolling climbs; enjoy the post-ride burgers, music, and farm animals.
